pageContext.name: Teddy
pageContext.description: 'When the veil between worlds is the thinnest, The Ghosts of Halloween can be seen…'  Sideshow and Trick or Treat Studios are proud to present the haunting work of William Paquet with this ominous and eerie Teddy Collectible Statue, but remember to... beware!  The Ghosts of Halloween collection features original creations inspired by chilling photographs of children in their Halloween costumes from a bygone era.  This resin statue features a grayscale paint scheme and is presented on a themed base. Teddy statue including the stand measures approximately 15' tall and comes in a beautiful collectors box.
